properties.name: Distances
properties.desc: The intervals between axes

properties.name: Angles
properties.desc: The angles of each axis

properties.name: Labels
properties.desc: The label of each axis

properties.name: CustomNumber
properties.desc: An optional custom bubble number

properties.name: Length
properties.desc: The length of the axes

properties.name: Limit
properties.desc: If not zero, the axes are not represented as one full line but as two lines of the given length

properties.name: BubbleSize
properties.desc: The size of the axis bubbles

properties.name: NumberingStyle
properties.desc: The numbering style

properties.name: DrawStyle
properties.desc: The type of line to draw this axis

properties.name: BubblePosition
properties.desc: Where to add bubbles to this axis: Start, end, both or none

properties.name: LineWidth
properties.desc: The line width to draw this axis

properties.name: LineColor
properties.desc: The color of this axis

properties.name: StartNumber
properties.desc: The number of the first axis

properties.name: FontName
properties.desc: The font to use for texts

properties.name: FontSize
properties.desc: The font size

properties.name: ShowLabel
properties.desc: If true, show the labels

properties.name: LabelOffset
properties.desc: A transformation to apply to each label

properties.name: Axes
properties.desc: The axes this system is made of

properties.name: Placement
properties.desc: The placement of this axis system

properties.name: Height
properties.desc: The height of this object

properties.name: HeightPropagate
properties.desc: If true, the height value propagates to contained objects if the height of those objects is set to 0

properties.name: LevelOffset
properties.desc: The level of the (0,0,0) point of this level

properties.name: Area
properties.desc: The computed floor area of this floor

properties.name: Description
properties.desc: An optional description for this component

properties.name: Tag
properties.desc: An optional tag for this component

properties.name: Shape
properties.desc: The shape of this object

properties.name: SavedInventor
properties.desc: This property stores an OpenInventor representation for this object

properties.name: OnlySolids
properties.desc: If true, only solids will be collected by this object when referenced from other files

properties.name: MaterialsTable
properties.desc: A MaterialName:SolidIndexesList map that relates material names with solid indexes to be used when referencing this object from other files

properties.name: LineWidth
properties.desc: The line width of this object

properties.name: OverrideUnit
properties.desc: An optional unit to express levels

properties.name: DisplayOffset
properties.desc: A transformation to apply to the level mark

properties.name: ShowLevel
properties.desc: If true, show the level

properties.name: ShowUnit
properties.desc: If true, show the unit on the level tag

properties.name: OriginOffset
properties.desc: If true, display offset will affect the origin mark too

properties.name: ShowLabel
properties.desc: If true, the object's label is displayed

properties.name: FontName
properties.desc: The font to be used for texts

properties.name: FontSize
properties.desc: The font size of texts

properties.name: DiffuseColor
properties.desc: The individual face colors

properties.name: SetWorkingPlane
properties.desc: If true, when activated, the working plane will automatically adapt to this level

properties.name: AutoWorkingPlane
properties.desc: If set to True, the working plane will be kept on Auto mode

properties.name: ViewData
properties.desc: Camera position data associated with this object

properties.name: RestoreView
properties.desc: If set, the view stored in this object will be restored on double-click

properties.name: DoubleClickActivates
properties.desc: If True, double-clicking this object in the tree activates it

properties.name: SaveInventor
properties.desc: If this is enabled, the OpenInventor representation of this object will be saved in the FreeCAD file, allowing to reference it in other files in lightweight mode.

properties.name: SavedInventor
properties.desc: A slot to save the OpenInventor representation of this object, if enabled

properties.name: ChildrenOverride
properties.desc: If true, show the objects contained in this Building Part will adopt these line, color and transparency settings

properties.name: ChildrenLineWidth
properties.desc: The line width of child objects

properties.name: ChildrenLineColor
properties.desc: The line color of child objects

properties.name: ChildrenShapeColor
properties.desc: The shape appearance of child objects

properties.name: ChildrenTransparency
properties.desc: The transparency of child objects

properties.name: CutView
properties.desc: Cut the view above this level

properties.name: CutMargin
properties.desc: The distance between the level plane and the cut line

properties.name: AutoCutView
properties.desc: Turn cutting on when activating this level

properties.name: AutogroupSize
properties.desc: The capture box for newly created objects expressed as [XMin,YMin,ZMin,XMax,YMax,ZMax]

properties.name: AutogroupBox
properties.desc: Turns auto group box on/off

properties.name: AutogroupAutosize
properties.desc: Automatically set size from contents

properties.name: AutogroupMargin
properties.desc: A margin to use when autosize is turned on

properties.name: Base
properties.desc: The base object this component is built upon

properties.name: CloneOf
properties.desc: The object this component is cloning

properties.name: Additions
properties.desc: Other shapes that are appended to this object

properties.name: Subtractions
properties.desc: Other shapes that are subtracted from this object

properties.name: Description
properties.desc: An optional description for this component

properties.name: Tag
properties.desc: An optional tag for this component

properties.name: StandardCode
properties.desc: An optional standard (OmniClass, etc...) code for this component

properties.name: Material
properties.desc: A material for this object

properties.name: MoveBase
properties.desc: Specifies if moving this object moves its base instead

properties.name: MoveWithHost
properties.desc: Specifies if this object must move together when its host is moved

properties.name: VerticalArea
properties.desc: The area of all vertical faces of this object

properties.name: HorizontalArea
properties.desc: The area of the projection of this object onto the XY plane

properties.name: PerimeterLength
properties.desc: The perimeter length of the horizontal area

properties.name: HiRes
properties.desc: An optional higher-resolution mesh or shape for this object

properties.name: Axis
properties.desc: An optional axis or axis system on which this object should be duplicated

properties.name: UseMaterialColor
properties.desc: Use the material color as this object's shape color, if available

properties.name: Host
properties.desc: An optional host object for this curtain wall

properties.name: Height
properties.desc: The height of the curtain wall, if based on an edge

properties.name: VerticalMullionNumber
properties.desc: The number of vertical mullions

properties.name: VerticalMullionAlignment
properties.desc: If the profile of the vertical mullions get aligned with the surface or not

properties.name: VerticalSections
properties.desc: The number of vertical sections of this curtain wall

properties.name: VerticalMullionHeight
properties.desc: The height of the vertical mullions profile, if no profile is used

properties.name: VerticalMullionWidth
properties.desc: The width of the vertical mullions profile, if no profile is used

properties.name: VerticalMullionProfile
properties.desc: A profile for vertical mullions (disables vertical mullion size)

properties.name: HorizontalMullionNumber
properties.desc: The number of horizontal mullions

properties.name: HorizontalMullionAlignment
properties.desc: If the profile of the horizontal mullions gets aligned with the surface or not

properties.name: HorizontalSections
properties.desc: The number of horizontal sections of this curtain wall

properties.name: HorizontalMullionHeight
properties.desc: The height of the horizontal mullions profile, if no profile is used

properties.name: HorizontalMullionWidth
properties.desc: The width of the horizontal mullions profile, if no profile is used

properties.name: HorizontalMullionProfile
properties.desc: A profile for horizontal mullions (disables horizontal mullion size)

properties.name: DiagonalMullionNumber
properties.desc: The number of diagonal mullions

properties.name: DiagonalMullionSize
properties.desc: The size of the diagonal mullions, if any, if no profile is used

properties.name: DiagonalMullionProfile
properties.desc: A profile for diagonal mullions, if any (disables horizontal mullion size)

properties.name: PanelNumber
properties.desc: The number of panels

properties.name: PanelThickness
properties.desc: The thickness of the panels

properties.name: SwapHorizontalVertical
properties.desc: Swaps horizontal and vertical lines

properties.name: Refine
properties.desc: Perform subtractions between components so none overlap

properties.name: CenterProfiles
properties.desc: Centers the profile over the edges or not

properties.name: VerticalDirection
properties.desc: The vertical direction reference to be used by this object to deduce vertical/horizontal directions. Keep it close to the actual vertical direction of your curtain wall

properties.name: OverrideEdges
properties.desc: Input are index numbers of edges of Base ArchSketch/Sketch geometries (in Edit mode).  Selected edges are used to create the shape of this Arch Curtain Wall (instead of using all edges by default).  [ENHANCED by ArchSketch] GUI 'Edit Curtain Wall' Tool is provided in external Add-on ('SketchArch') to let users to select the edges interactively.  'Toponaming-Tolerant' if ArchSketch is used in Base (and SketchArch Add-on is installed).  Warning : Not 'Toponaming-Tolerant' if just Sketch is used. Property is ignored if Base ArchSketch provided the selected edges.

properties.name: Model
properties.desc: The model description of this equipment

properties.name: ProductURL
properties.desc: The URL of the product page of this equipment

properties.name: StandardCode
properties.desc: A standard code (MasterFormat, OmniClass,...)

properties.name: SnapPoints
properties.desc: Additional snap points for this equipment

properties.name: EquipmentPower
properties.desc: The electric power needed by this equipment in Watts

properties.desc: A single fence post

properties.desc: The Path the fence should follow

properties.desc: The number of sections the fence is built of

properties.desc: The number of posts used to build the fence

properties.name: UseOriginalColors
properties.desc: When true, the fence will be colored like the original post and section.

properties.desc: Specifies if the profile must be aligned with the extrusion wires

properties.desc: An offset vector between the base sketch and the frame

properties.desc: Crossing point of the path on the profile.

properties.desc: An optional additional placement to add to the profile before extruding it

properties.name: Rotation
properties.desc: The rotation of the profile around its extrusion axis

properties.name: Edges
properties.desc: The type of edges to consider

properties.name: Fuse
properties.desc: If true, geometry is fused, otherwise a compound

properties.desc: The total height of this grid

properties.desc: Creates automatic column divisions (set to 0 to disable)

properties.desc: Creates automatic row divisions (set to 0 to disable)

properties.desc: When in edge midpoint mode, if this grid must reorient its children along edge normals or not

properties.desc: The direction to use to spread the bars. Keep (0,0,0) for automatic direction.

properties.desc: Total length of all rebars

properties.desc: The total length of the borders of the roof

properties.desc: The filter column

properties.name: CreateSpreadsheet
properties.desc: If True, a spreadsheet containing the results is recreated when needed

properties.name: DetailedResults
properties.desc: If True, additional lines with each individual object are added to the results

properties.name: AutoUpdate
properties.desc: If True, the schedule and the associated spreadsheet are updated whenever the document is recomputed

properties.name: Schedule
properties.desc: The BIM Schedule that uses this spreadsheet

properties.name: Placement
properties.desc: The placement of this object

properties.name: Shape
properties.desc: The shape of this object

properties.name: Objects
properties.desc: The objects that must be considered by this section plane. Empty means the whole document.

properties.name: OnlySolids
properties.desc: If false, non-solids will be cut too, with possible wrong results.

properties.name: Clip
properties.desc: If True, resulting views will be clipped to the section plane area.

properties.name: UseMaterialColorForFill
properties.desc: If true, the color of the objects material will be used to fill cut areas.

properties.name: Depth
properties.desc: Geometry further than this value will be cut off. Keep zero for unlimited.

properties.desc: The display length of this section plane

properties.desc: The display height of this section plane

properties.name: ArrowSize
properties.desc: The size of the arrows of this section plane

properties.name: Transparency
properties.desc: The transparency of this object

properties.desc: The line width of this object

properties.desc: Show the cut in the 3D view

properties.desc: The color of this object

properties.desc: Show the cut in the 3D view

properties.name: CutMargin
properties.desc: The distance between the cut plane and the actual view cut (keep this a very small value but not zero)

properties.name: ShowLabel
properties.desc: Show the label in the 3D view

properties.name: FontName
properties.desc: The name of the font

properties.name: FontSize
properties.desc: The size of the text font

properties.desc: The street and house number of this site, with postal box or apartment number if needed

properties.desc: The postal or zip code of this site

properties.name: City
properties.desc: The city of this site

properties.name: Region
properties.desc: The region, province or county of this site

properties.name: Country
properties.desc: The country of this site

properties.name: Latitude
properties.desc: The latitude of this site

properties.name: Longitude
properties.desc: The latitude of this site

properties.name: Declination
properties.desc: Angle between the true North and the North direction in this document

properties.name: Elevation
properties.desc: The elevation of level 0 of this site

properties.name: Url
properties.desc: A URL that shows this site in a mapping website

properties.name: Additions
properties.desc: Other shapes that are appended to this object

properties.name: Subtractions
properties.desc: Other shapes that are subtracted from this object

properties.name: ProjectedArea
properties.desc: The area of the projection of this object onto the XY plane

properties.desc: The perimeter length of the projected area

properties.desc: The volume of earth to be added to this terrain

properties.desc: The volume of earth to be removed from this terrain

properties.desc: Remove splitters from the resulting shape

properties.desc: An optional offset between the model (0,0,0) origin and the point indicated by the geocoordinates

properties.name: IfcType
properties.desc: The type of this object

properties.name: TimeZone
properties.desc: The time zone where this site is located

properties.name: EPWFile
properties.desc: An optional EPW File for the location of this site. Refer to the Site documentation to know how to obtain one

properties.desc: Show wind rose diagram or not. Uses solar diagram scale. Needs Ladybug module

properties.desc: Show solar diagram or not

properties.desc: The scale of the solar diagram

properties.name: SolarDiagramPosition
properties.desc: The position of the solar diagram

properties.name: SolarDiagramColor
properties.desc: The color of the solar diagram

properties.name: Orientation
properties.desc: When set to 'True North' the whole geometry will be rotated to match the true north of this site

properties.name: Compass
properties.desc: Show compass or not

properties.name: CompassRotation
properties.desc: The rotation of the Compass relative to the Site

properties.name: CompassPosition
properties.desc: The position of the Compass relative to the Site placement

properties.name: UpdateDeclination
properties.desc: Update the Declination value based on the compass rotation

properties.name: Boundaries
properties.desc: The objects that make the boundaries of this space object

properties.name: Area
properties.desc: Identical to Horizontal Area

properties.name: FinishFloor
properties.desc: The finishing of the floor of this space

properties.name: FinishWalls
properties.desc: The finishing of the walls of this space

properties.name: FinishCeiling
properties.desc: The finishing of the ceiling of this space

properties.name: Group
properties.desc: Objects that are included inside this space, such as furniture

properties.name: SpaceType
properties.desc: The type of this space

properties.name: FloorThickness
properties.desc: The thickness of the floor finish

properties.name: NumberOfPeople
properties.desc: The number of people who typically occupy this space

properties.name: LightingPower
properties.desc: The electric power needed to light this space in Watts

properties.name: EquipmentPower
properties.desc: The electric power needed by the equipment of this space in Watts

properties.name: AutoPower
properties.desc: If True, Equipment Power will be automatically filled by the equipment included in this space

properties.name: Conditioning
properties.desc: The type of air conditioning of this space

properties.name: Internal
properties.desc: Specifies if this space is internal or external

properties.name: AreaCalculationType
properties.desc: Defines the calculation type for the horizontal area and its perimeter length

properties.name: Text
properties.desc: The text to show. Use $area, $label, $tag, $longname, $description and for finishes $floor, $walls, $ceiling to insert the respective data

properties.name: FontName
properties.desc: The name of the font

properties.name: TextColor
properties.desc: The color of the area text

properties.name: FontSize
properties.desc: The size of the text font

properties.name: FirstLine
properties.desc: The size of the first line of text

properties.name: LineSpacing
properties.desc: The space between the lines of text

properties.name: TextPosition
properties.desc: The position of the text. Leave (0,0,0) for automatic position

properties.name: TextAlign
properties.desc: The justification of the text

properties.name: Decimals
properties.desc: The number of decimals to use for calculated texts

properties.name: ShowUnit
properties.desc: Show the unit suffix

properties.name: Length
properties.desc: The length of these stairs, if no baseline is defined

properties.name: Width
properties.desc: The width of these stairs

properties.name: Height
properties.desc: The total height of these stairs

properties.name: Align
properties.desc: The alignment of these stairs on their baseline, if applicable

properties.name: WidthOfLanding
properties.desc: The width of a Landing (Second edge and after - First edge follows Width property)

properties.name: NumberOfSteps
properties.desc: The number of risers in these stairs

properties.name: TreadDepth
properties.desc: The depth of the treads of these stairs

properties.name: RiserHeight
properties.desc: The height of the risers of these stairs

properties.name: Nosing
properties.desc: The size of the nosing

properties.name: TreadThickness
properties.desc: The thickness of the treads

properties.name: BlondelRatio
properties.desc: The Blondel ratio indicates comfortable stairs and should be between 62 and 64cm or 24.5 and 25.5in

properties.name: RiserThickness
properties.desc: The thickness of the risers

properties.name: LandingDepth
properties.desc: The depth of the landing of these stairs

properties.name: TreadDepthEnforce
properties.desc: The depth of the treads of these stairs - Enforced regardless of Length or edge's Length

properties.name: RiserHeightEnforce
properties.desc: The height of the risers of these stairs - Enforced regardless of Height or edge's Height

properties.name: Flight
properties.desc: The direction of flight after landing

properties.name: LastSegment
properties.desc: Last Segment (Flight or Landing) of Arch Stairs connecting to This Segment

properties.name: AbsTop
properties.desc: The 'absolute' top level of a flight of stairs leads to

properties.name: OutlineLeft
properties.desc: The 'left outline' of stairs

properties.name: OutlineRight
properties.desc: The 'left outline' of stairs

properties.name: RailingLeft
properties.desc: Name of Railing object (left) created

properties.name: RailingRight
properties.desc: Name of Railing object (right) created

properties.name: OutlineLeftAll
properties.desc: The 'left outline' of all segments of stairs

properties.name: OutlineRightAll
properties.desc: The 'right outline' of all segments of stairs

properties.name: RailingHeightLeft
properties.desc: Height of Railing on Left hand side from Stairs or Landing

properties.name: RailingHeightRight
properties.desc: Height of Railing on Right hand side from Stairs or Landing

properties.name: RailingOffsetLeft
properties.desc: Offset of Railing on Left hand side from stairs or landing Edge

properties.name: RailingOffsetRight
properties.desc: Offset of Railing on Right hand side from stairs or landing Edge

properties.name: Landings
properties.desc: The type of landings of these stairs

properties.name: Winders
properties.desc: The type of winders in these stairs

properties.name: Structure
properties.desc: The type of structure of these stairs

properties.name: StructureThickness
properties.desc: The thickness of the massive structure or of the stringers

properties.name: StringerWidth
properties.desc: The width of the stringers

properties.name: StructureOffset
properties.desc: The offset between the border of the stairs and the structure

properties.name: StringerOverlap
properties.desc: The overlap of the stringers above the bottom of the treads

properties.name: DownSlabThickness
properties.desc: The thickness of the lower floor slab

properties.name: UpSlabThickness
properties.desc: The thickness of the upper floor slab

properties.name: ConnectionDownStartStairs
properties.desc: The type of connection between the lower floor slab and the start of the stairs

properties.name: ConnectionEndStairsUp
properties.desc: The type of connection between the end of the stairs and the upper floor slab

properties.name: Tool
properties.desc: An optional extrusion path for this element

properties.name: ComputedLength
properties.desc: The computed length of the extrusion path

properties.name: ToolOffsetFirst
properties.desc: Start offset distance along the extrusion path (positive: extend, negative: trim)

properties.name: ToolOffsetLast
properties.desc: End offset distance along the extrusion path (positive: extend, negative: trim)

properties.name: BasePerpendicularToTool
properties.desc: Automatically align the Base of the Structure perpendicular to the Tool axis

properties.name: BaseOffsetX
properties.desc: X offset between the Base origin and the Tool axis (only used if BasePerpendicularToTool is True)

properties.name: BaseOffsetY
properties.desc: Y offset between the Base origin and the Tool axis (only used if BasePerpendicularToTool is True)

properties.name: BaseMirror
properties.desc: Mirror the Base along its Y axis (only used if BasePerpendicularToTool is True)

properties.name: BaseRotation
properties.desc: Base rotation around the Tool axis (only used if BasePerpendicularToTool is True)

properties.name: Length
properties.desc: The length of this element, if not based on a profile

properties.name: Width
properties.desc: The width of this element, if not based on a profile

properties.name: Height
properties.desc: The height or extrusion depth of this element. Keep 0 for automatic

properties.name: Normal
properties.desc: The normal extrusion direction of this object (keep (0,0,0) for automatic normal)

properties.name: Nodes
properties.desc: The structural nodes of this element

properties.name: Profile
properties.desc: A description of the standard profile this element is based upon

properties.name: NodesOffset
properties.desc: Offset distance between the centerline and the nodes line

properties.name: FaceMaker
properties.desc: The facemaker type to use to build the profile of this object

properties.name: ArchSketchEdges
properties.desc: Selected edges (or group of edges) of the base ArchSketch, to use in creating the shape of this BIM Structure (instead of using all the Base shape's edges by default).  Input are index numbers of edges or groups.

properties.name: NodeLine
properties.desc: The width of the nodes line

properties.name: NodeSize
properties.desc: The size of the node points

properties.name: NodeColor
properties.desc: The color of the nodes line

properties.name: NodeType
properties.desc: The type of structural node

properties.name: ShowNodes
properties.desc: If the nodes are visible or not

properties.name: Tool
properties.desc: An optional extrusion path for this element

properties.name: Axes
properties.desc: Axes systems this structure is built on

properties.name: Exclude
properties.desc: The element numbers to exclude when this structure is based on axes

properties.name: Align
properties.desc: If true the element are aligned with axes

properties.name: TrussAngle
properties.desc: The angle of the truss

properties.name: SlantType
properties.desc: The slant type of this truss

properties.name: Normal
properties.desc: The normal direction of this truss

properties.name: HeightStart
properties.desc: The height of the truss at the start position

properties.name: HeightEnd
properties.desc: The height of the truss at the end position

properties.name: StrutStartOffset
properties.desc: An optional start offset for the top strut

properties.name: StrutEndOffset
properties.desc: An optional end offset for the top strut

properties.name: StrutHeight
properties.desc: The height of the main top and bottom elements of the truss

properties.name: StrutWidth
properties.desc: The width of the main top and bottom elements of the truss

properties.name: RodType
properties.desc: The type of the middle element of the truss

properties.name: RodDirection
properties.desc: The direction of the rods

properties.name: RodSize
properties.desc: The diameter or side of the rods

properties.name: RodSections
properties.desc: The number of rod sections

properties.name: RodEnd
properties.desc: If the truss has a rod at its endpoint or not

properties.name: RodMode
properties.desc: How to draw the rods

properties.name: Length
properties.desc: The length of this wall. Read-only if this wall is not based on an unconstrained sketch with a single edge, or on a Draft Wire with a single edge. Refer to wiki for details how length is deduced.

properties.name: Width
properties.desc: The width of this wall. Not used if this wall is based on a face. Disabled and ignored if Base object (ArchSketch) provides the information.

properties.name: OverrideWidth
properties.desc: This overrides Width attribute to set width of each segment of wall.  Disabled and ignored if Base object (ArchSketch) provides Widths information, with getWidths() method  (If a value is zero, the value of 'Width' will be followed).  [ENHANCEMENT by ArchSketch] GUI 'Edit Wall Segment Width' Tool is provided in external SketchArch Add-on to let users to set the values interactively.  'Toponaming-Tolerant' if ArchSketch is used in Base (and SketchArch Add-on is installed).  Warning : Not 'Toponaming-Tolerant' if just Sketch is used.

properties.name: OverrideAlign
properties.desc: This overrides Align attribute to set align of each segment of wall.  Disabled and ignored if Base object (ArchSketch) provides Aligns information, with getAligns() method  (If a value is not 'Left, Right, Center', the value of 'Align' will be followed).  [ENHANCEMENT by ArchSketch] GUI 'Edit Wall Segment Align' Tool is provided in external SketchArch Add-on to let users to set the values interactively.  'Toponaming-Tolerant' if ArchSketch is used in Base (and SketchArch Add-on is installed).  Warning : Not 'Toponaming-Tolerant' if just Sketch is used.

properties.name: OverrideOffset
properties.desc: This overrides Offset attribute to set offset of each segment of wall.  Disabled and ignored if Base object (ArchSketch) provides Offsets information, with getOffsets() method  (If a value is zero, the value of 'Offset' will be followed).  [ENHANCED by ArchSketch] GUI 'Edit Wall Segment Offset' Tool is provided in external Add-on ('SketchArch') to let users to select the edges interactively.  'Toponaming-Tolerant' if ArchSketch is used in Base (and SketchArch Add-on is installed).  Warning : Not 'Toponaming-Tolerant' if just Sketch is used. Property is ignored if Base ArchSketch provided the selected edges.

properties.name: Height
properties.desc: The height of this wall. Keep 0 for automatic. Not used if this wall is based on a solid

properties.name: Area
properties.desc: The area of this wall as a simple Height * Length calculation

properties.name: Align
properties.desc: The alignment of this wall on its base object, if applicable. Disabled and ignored if Base object (ArchSketch) provides the information.

properties.name: Normal
properties.desc: The normal extrusion direction of this object (keep (0,0,0) for automatic normal)

properties.name: Face
properties.desc: The face number of the base object used to build this wall

properties.name: Offset
properties.desc: The offset between this wall and its baseline (only for left and right alignments). Disabled and ignored if Base object (ArchSketch) provides the information.

properties.name: MakeBlocks
properties.desc: Enable this to make the wall generate blocks

properties.name: BlockLength
properties.desc: The length of each block

properties.name: BlockHeight
properties.desc: The height of each block

properties.name: OffsetFirst
properties.desc: The horizontal offset of the first line of blocks

properties.name: OffsetSecond
properties.desc: The horizontal offset of the second line of blocks

properties.name: Joint
properties.desc: The size of the joints between each block

properties.name: CountEntire
properties.desc: The number of entire blocks

properties.name: CountBroken
properties.desc: The number of broken blocks

properties.name: ArchSketchData
properties.desc: Use Base ArchSketch (if used) data (e.g. widths, aligns, offsets) instead of Wall's properties

properties.name: ArchSketchEdges
properties.desc: Selected edges (or group of edges) of the base Sketch/ArchSketch, to use in creating the shape of this Arch Wall (instead of using all the Base Sketch/ArchSketch's edges by default).  Input are index numbers of edges or groups.  Disabled and ignored if Base object (ArchSketch) provides selected edges (as Wall Axis) information, with getWallBaseShapeEdgesInfo() method.  [ENHANCEMENT by ArchSketch] GUI 'Edit Wall Segment' Tool is provided in external SketchArch Add-on to let users to (de)select the edges interactively.  'Toponaming-Tolerant' if ArchSketch is used in Base (and SketchArch Add-on is installed).  Warning : Not 'Toponaming-Tolerant' if just Sketch is used.

properties.name: Hosts
properties.desc: The objects that host this window

properties.name: WindowParts
properties.desc: The components of this window

properties.name: HoleDepth
properties.desc: The depth of the hole that this window makes in its host object. If 0, the value will be calculated automatically.

properties.name: Subvolume
properties.desc: An optional object that defines a volume to be subtracted from hosts of this window

properties.name: Width
properties.desc: The width of this window

properties.name: Height
properties.desc: The height of this window

properties.name: Normal
properties.desc: The normal direction of this window

properties.name: Preset
properties.desc: The preset number this window is based on

properties.name: Frame
properties.desc: The frame size of this window

properties.name: Offset
properties.desc: The offset size of this window

properties.name: Area
properties.desc: The area of this window

properties.name: LouvreWidth
properties.desc: The width of louvre elements

properties.name: LouvreSpacing
properties.desc: The space between louvre elements

properties.name: Opening
properties.desc: Opens the subcomponents that have a hinge defined

properties.name: HoleWire
properties.desc: The number of the wire that defines the hole. If 0, the value will be calculated automatically

properties.name: SymbolPlan
properties.desc: Shows plan opening symbols if available

properties.name: SymbolElevation
properties.desc: Show elevation opening symbols if available

properties.name: HoleWire
properties.desc: The number of the wire that defines the hole. A value of 0 means automatic
